name: wxcode-admin-cargo-fleet
title: Cargo Fleet Admin
description: Industrial-clean light-mode admin aesthetic: white/slate canvas, dark-navy sidebar, orange-amber accent family, crisp status pills, and compact bordered cards. Archetype = branded sidebar with entity switcher and grouped nav + topbar with search and context filter + 4 KPI cards + 2-column middle (Kanban status board + abstract network visualization) + full-width records table with status pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this industrial-clean light admin aesthetic to my domain — white/slate canvas, dark-navy sidebar with entity switcher and grouped nav, topbar with search and context filter, 4 KPI cards, a Kanban status board, an abstract network visualization, and a full-width records table with status pills, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个工业清洁风格浅色管理后台应用到我的领域：白色/石板色画布、深海军蓝侧边栏（带实体切换器和分组导航）、顶部栏（搜索 + 上下文筛选器）、4 个 KPI 卡片、看板状态面板、抽象网络可视化图，以及带状态标签的全宽记录表格，并配套列表、表单、详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
